hook.visual_action: Red blocks are placed quickly on a grid, clearing multiple horizontal lines with a glowing effect.

scene_flow: Fast-paced placement of red blocks clearing multiple lines on a grid.
Quick cuts showing different block colors and shapes being cleared in rapid succession.
A montage of positive feedback text overlays like 'Great!' and 'Brilliant!' appearing as scores climb.
Final brand reveal for 'Block Rush' featuring a search bar and app store download buttons.
on_screen_text: This game is perfect for killing boredom
Easy to solve but hard to get high score
audience_proxy: Casual puzzle enthusiasts looking for satisfying, low-stress gameplay to kill time.
